name: Appliancer Breakerbuncle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>遮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>断</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブレイカーバンクル
desc: During damage calculation, if an "Appliancer" monster you control battles an opponent's monster (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; for that battle, that monster you control cannot be destroyed, also you take no battle damage. If an "Appliancer" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by a card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead.
mnst_eff: During damage calculation, if an "Appliancer" monster you control battles an opponent's monster (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; for that battle, that monster you control cannot be destroyed, also you take no battle damage. If an "Appliancer" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by a card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead.
eff: During damage calculation, if an "Appliancer" monster you control battles an opponent's monster (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; for that battle, that monster you control cannot be destroyed, also you take no battle damage. If an "Appliancer" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by a card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
